title: Onboarding - Check onboarding screens UI
scenario: Verify the UI of the onboarding screens (Organized, Up-to-Date, and Personal pages) matches the Figma reference.
steps: Open the app and navigate to the onboarding flow.
Verify the Organized page UI matches the Figma reference.
Verify the Up-to-Date page UI matches the Figma reference.
Verify the Personal page UI matches the Figma reference.
expected: All three onboarding screens (Organized, Up-to-Date, Personal) match the Figma reference design.
